objective: Split experimental_named shader assets into behavior/responsibility subfolders while preserving catalog shaderAsset and pubspec declarations. Boundaries: coupled_orbits owns shaders whose c/z parameters co-evolve and exposes only .frag assets; rational_singularities owns rational/log-power pole-driven maps and must not know catalog/module wiring; transcendental_deformations owns sine/tangent/log-radial deformations and exposes asset files only; discrete_attractors owns named 2D attractor map shaders with parameter uniforms; polynomial_variants owns polynomial/fold/scaled escape maps; root_finding owns iterative solver methods; physical_simulation owns physics-inspired simulation shaders.
completedSlices: Added focused shader asset contract test for experimental_named catalog entries, pubspec declarations, and file existence.

Restored filesystem topology to match existing catalog/pubspec declarations: no experimental_named .frag files remain at root.
